title: NEON BONE RUSH
attractText:
NEON BONE RUSH
Button 1: START / JUMP
Button 2: DASH
Hold stick to lean in air
Chain near-misses and pickups to build FEVER
html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0"><style>html,body{margin:0;background:#05070d;color:#fff;height:100%;font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;overflow:hidden}body{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}canvas{width:min(96vmin,960px);height:min(96vmin,960px);image-rendering:auto;display:block;background:#0a0f1f;box-shadow:0 0 40px #000,inset 0 0 40px #09101f;border:4px solid #1e2a44}</style></head><body><canvas id="game" width="960" height="960"></canvas><script>(()=>{const c=document.getElementById('game'),x=c.getContext('2d');let W=960,H=960;const input=()=>window.arcadeInput||{};let state='title',t=0,runTime=0,cam=0,score=0,best=0,dist=0,gameOverTimer=0;let audioCtx=null;function unlockAudio(){if(audioCtx)return;try{audioCtx=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();}catch(e){}}function snd(f1,f2,dur,type,vol){if(!audioCtx)return;const o=audioCtx.createOscillator(),g=audioCtx.createGain();o.type=type||'square';o.frequency.value=f1;g.gain.value=vol||0.03;o.connect(g);g.connect(audioCtx.destination);const now=audioCtx.currentTime;o.frequency.setValueAtTime(f1,now);o.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(Math.max(40,f2),now+dur);g.gain.setValueAtTime(vol||0.03,now);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,now+dur);o.start(now);o.stop(now+dur);}const player={x:180,y:0,vx:0,vy:0,w:42,h:64,onGround:false,coyote:0,jumpBuf:0,dash:0,dashCd:0,trail:0,alive:true};let segs=[],hazards=[],pickups=[],particles=[],stars=[];for(let i=0;i<120;i++)stars.push({x:Math.random()*W,y:Math.random()*H,s:Math.random()*2+1,sp:20+Math.random()*120});let fever=0,chain=0,mult=1,lastNear=0;function reset(){state='play';t=0;runTime=0;cam=0;score=0;dist=0;gameOverTimer=0;fever=0;chain=0;mult=1;lastNear=0;player.x=180;player.y=620;player.vx=0;player.vy=0;player.onGround=false;player.coyote=0;player.jumpBuf=0;player.dash=0;player.dashCd=0;player.trail=0;player.alive=true;segs=[];hazards=[];pickups=[];particles=[];let sx=0;for(let i=0;i<16;i++){let w=160+Math.random()*120;let y=700-(i%3)*40;segs.push({x:sx,y:y,w:w});sx+=w+40;}spawnUntil(cam+1500);snd(220,440,0.12,'sawtooth',0.05);}function groundYAt(px){let best=null;for(const s of segs){if(px>=s.x-20&&px<=s.x+s.w+20){if(best===null||s.y<best)best=s.y;}}return best;}function spawnUntil(target){let last=segs[segs.length-1];while(last.x+last.w<target){let gap=40+Math.random()*90+Math.min(90,runTime*2);let w=120+Math.random()*180;let y=620+Math.sin((last.x+gap)*0.01)*70+(Math.random()*120-60);y=Math.max(320,Math.min(790,y));let nx=last.x+last.w+gap;let seg={x:nx,y:y,w:w};segs.push(seg);if(Math.random()<0.75){let hx=nx+30+Math.random()*(w-60),kind=Math.random()<0.6?'spike':'gate';hazards.push({x:hx,y:y,kind:kind,w:kind==='spike'?48:32,h:kind==='spike'?34:82,passed:false});}if(Math.random()<0.78){let count=1+((Math.random()<0.45)?1:0)+((Math.random()<0.18)?1:0);for(let i=0;i<count;i++){pickups.push({x:nx+40+i*48+Math.random()*20,y:y-70-Math.random()*90,r:12,taken:false,pulse:Math.random()*6.28});}}last=seg;}}function addParticles(px,py,n,col){for(let i=0;i<n;i++)particles.push({x:px,y:py,vx:(Math.random()*2-1)*8,vy:(Math.random()*2-1)*8-2,life:20+Math.random()*20,col:col,size:3+Math.random()*5});}function die(){if(!player.alive)return;player.alive=false;state='dead';gameOverTimer=0;snd(140,50,0.35,'sawtooth',0.08);addParticles(player.x,player.y,24,'#ff5a7a');}function update(){t++;const a=input();if((a.button1Pressed||a.button2Pressed)&&audioCtx&&audioCtx.state==='suspended')audioCtx.resume();if(state==='title'){if(a.button1Pressed){unlockAudio();snd(300,600,0.12,'triangle',0.05);reset();}return;}if(state==='dead'){gameOverTimer++;for(const p of particles){p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;p.vy+=0.25;p.life--;}particles=particles.filter(p=>p.life>0);if(a.button1Pressed&&gameOverTimer>15){unlockAudio();snd(260,520,0.12,'triangle',0.05);reset();}return;}runTime+=1/60;dist=cam/10;spawnUntil(cam+1800);let move=0;if(a.left)move=-1;if(a.right)move=1;player.jumpBuf=Math.max(0,player.jumpBuf-1);if(a.button1Pressed)player.jumpBuf=8;player.dashCd=Math.max(0,player.dashCd-1);if(a.button2Pressed&&player.dashCd===0&&player.alive){player.dash=9;player.dashCd=35;player.vx+=8.5;player.vy*=0.2;player.trail=10;snd(900,220,0.09,'sawtooth',0.05);addParticles(player.x,player.y,10,'#79f7ff');}let gy=groundYAt(player.x);let onPlat=gy!==null&&player.y+player.h/2>=gy-8&&player.y+player.h/2<=gy+18&&player.vy>=0;if(onPlat){player.onGround=true;player.coyote=8;player.y=gy-player.h/2;player.vy=0;}else{player.onGround=false;player.coyote=Math.max(0,player.coyote-1);}if(player.jumpBuf>0&&player.coyote>0){player.vy=-15.5;player.jumpBuf=0;player.coyote=0;player.onGround=false;snd(620,260,0.12,'square',0.05);addParticles(player.x,player.y+20,8,'#fff1a8');}let target=5.2+runTime*0.12+fever*0.04;if(player.dash>0){player.dash--;player.vx=13.5+target;player.trail=8;}else{player.vx+=(target+move*2.2-player.vx)*0.12;}if(!player.onGround){player.vy+=0.72;player.vx+=move*0.08;player.vx=Math.max(player.vx,4.5);}player.x+=player.vx;player.y+=player.vy;cam=Math.max(cam,player.x-180);if(player.y>1000)die();for(const h of hazards){if(h.passed)continue;let hx=h.x,hy=h.kind==='spike'?h.y-h.h:h.y-h.h,hw=h.w,hh=h.h;let px=player.x-player.w/2,py=player.y-player.h/2;if(px<hx+hw&&px+player.w>hx&&py<hy+hh&&py+player.h>hy){if(player.dash>0&&h.kind==='gate'){h.passed=true;score+=120*mult;snd(220,880,0.1,'triangle',0.05);addParticles(hx+hw/2,hy+hh/2,12,'#79f7ff');}else die();}else if(!h.passed&&h.x+hw<player.x-10){h.passed=true;let close=Math.abs((player.y+player.h/2)-h.y)<34||Math.abs(player.x-(h.x+hw))<26;if(close){chain=Math.min(9,chain+1);fever=Math.min(100,fever+14);lastNear=40;score+=(40+chain*20)*mult;snd(500,760,0.07,'triangle',0.04);} } }for(const p of pickups){if(p.taken)continue;p.pulse+=0.18;let dx=player.x-p.x,dy=player.y-p.y;if(dx*dx+dy*dy<34*34){p.taken=true;fever=Math.min(100,fever+10);score+=(25+chain*10)*mult;snd(880,1320,0.08,'square',0.04);addParticles(p.x,p.y,8,'#ffe66d');}}fever=Math.max(0,fever-0.06);if(lastNear>0)lastNear--;else chain=Math.max(0,chain-0.02);mult=1+Math.floor(fever/25);score+=Math.floor((1+mult*0.3)*(1+runTime*0.02));best=Math.max(best,score);player.trail=Math.max(0,player.trail-1);segs=segs.filter(s=>s.x+s.w>cam-200);hazards=hazards.filter(h=>!h.passed||h.x>cam-220);pickups=pickups.filter(p=>!p.taken&&p.x>cam-100||p.taken&&Math.random()>0.1);for(const p of particles){p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;p.vy+=0.18;p.life--;}particles=particles.filter(p=>p.life>0);}function drawBg(){x.fillStyle='#05070d';x.fillRect(0,0,W,H);for(const s of stars){let sx=(s.x-cam*0.15*s.s)% (W+40);if(sx<0)sx+=W+40;x.fillStyle='rgba(120,180,255,0.15)';x.fillRect(sx,s.y,2*s.s,2*s.s);}for(let i=0;i<8;i++){let yy=180+i*90+Math.sin((cam*0.01)+i)*16;x.strokeStyle='rgba(80,120,255,0.08)';x.lineWidth=3;x.beginPath();x.moveTo(40,yy);x.lineTo(920,yy);x.stroke();}for(let i=0;i<6;i++){let bx=100+((i*170-cam*0.35)%1100);if(bx<0)bx+=1100;x.fillStyle='rgba(255,80,160,0.08)';x.fillRect(bx,180+Math.sin(i+cam*0.005)*70,60,360);}}function drawWorld(){drawBg();x.save();x.translate(-cam,0);for(const s of segs){x.fillStyle='#17233f';x.fillRect(s.x,s.y,s.w,26);x.fillStyle='#6ef0ff';x.fillRect(s.x,s.y,s.w,5);for(let i=0;i<s.w;i+=32){x.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';x.fillRect(s.x+i,s.y+8,18,6);}}for(const h of hazards){if(h.passed)continue;if(h.kind==='spike'){x.fillStyle='#ff5a7a';x.beginPath();x.moveTo(h.x,h.y);x.lineTo(h.x+h.w/2,h.y-h.h);x.lineTo(h.x+h.w,h.y);x.closePath();x.fill();x.fillStyle='#ffd1da';x.fillRect(h.x+18,h.y-16,12,8);}else{x.fillStyle='#9b5cff';x.fillRect(h.x,h.y-h.h,h.w,h.h);x.fillStyle='#79f7ff';x.fillRect(h.x-5,h.y-h.h,42,8);}}for(const p of pickups){if(p.taken)continue;let r=p.r+Math.sin(p.pulse)*2;x.fillStyle='rgba(255,230,109,0.2)';x.beginPath();x.arc(p.x,p.y,r+10,0,6.28);x.fill();x.fillStyle='#ffe66d';x.beginPath();x.arc(p.x,p.y,r,0,6.28);x.fill();x.fillStyle='#fff8c2';x.fillRect(p.x-4,p.y-14,8,28);x.fillRect(p.x-14,p.y-4,28,8);}for(const p of particles){x.globalAlpha=Math.max(0,p.life/40);x.fillStyle=p.col;x.fillRect(p.x-p.size/2,p.y-p.size/2,p.size,p.size);}x.globalAlpha=1;if(player.alive){for(let i=0;i<player.trail;i++){x.globalAlpha=(i+1)/(player.trail+3)*0.35;x.fillStyle='#79f7ff';x.fillRect(player.x-20-i*10,player.y-26,40,52);}x.globalAlpha=1;x.fillStyle=player.dash>0?'#79f7ff':'#f4f7ff';x.fillRect(player.x-player.w/2,player.y-player.h/2,player.w,player.h);x.fillStyle='#ff4d8d';x.fillRect(player.x+2,player.y-18,10,10);x.fillStyle='#111';x.fillRect(player.x+10,player.y-14,6,6);x.fillStyle='#ffe66d';x.fillRect(player.x-player.w/2-4,player.y+player.h/2-8,player.w+8,8);}x.restore();}function txt(str,xx,yy,size,color,align){x.fillStyle=color||'#fff';x.font='bold '+size+'px Arial';x.textAlign=align||'left';x.fillText(str,xx,yy);}function drawUI(){x.fillStyle='rgba(5,8,18,0.7)';x.fillRect(24,24,320,120);txt('SCORE '+score,42,72,34,'#fff');txt('BEST '+best,42,110,22,'#9fb4ff');txt('x'+mult+' FEVER',230,72,28,fever>60?'#ffe66d':'#79f7ff');x.strokeStyle='#2a3b66';x.strokeRect(42,124,260,16);x.fillStyle=fever>75?'#ff4d8d':fever>35?'#ffe66d':'#79f7ff';x.fillRect(42,124,260*(fever/100),16);txt('DIST '+Math.floor(dist),740,64,28,'#d7e1ff');txt('B1 JUMP',740,100,20,'#fff');txt('B2 DASH',740,126,20,'#fff');}function drawTitle(){drawBg();txt('NEON',480,250,90,'#79f7ff','center');txt('BONE RUSH',480,340,110,'#ff4d8d','center');x.fillStyle='rgba(10,15,31,0.85)';x.fillRect(120,430,720,260);txt('ENDLESS SIDE-VIEW SCORE FEVER',480,500,34,'#ffe66d','center');txt('B1 START / JUMP',480,560,30,'#fff','center');txt('B2 DASH THROUGH GATES',480,605,30,'#fff','center');txt('NEAR-MISS HAZARDS + GRAB BONES TO BUILD FEVER',480,650,24,'#9fd1ff','center');if((Math.floor(t/30)%2)===0)txt('PRESS BUTTON 1',480,790,46,'#fff','center');for(let i=0;i<3;i++){let bx=250+i*180; x.fillStyle=i===1?'#79f7ff':'#f4f7ff'; x.fillRect(bx,370,34,52); x.fillStyle='#ff4d8d'; x.fillRect(bx+20,384,8,8);}}function drawDead(){drawWorld();drawUI();x.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.55)';x.fillRect(100,250,760,360);txt('RUN CRACKED',480,380,82,'#ff5a7a','center');txt('FINAL '+score,480,470,42,'#fff','center');txt('BEST '+best,480,525,30,'#9fb4ff','center');txt('B1 RETRY',480,620,40,'#ffe66d','center');}function loop(){update();if(state==='title')drawTitle();else if(state==='dead')drawDead();else{drawWorld();drawUI();}requestAnimationFrame(loop);}loop();})();</script></body></html>
